hero.title: About LeClap
hero.tagline: A cinematic video composer that runs entirely in your browser. Compose from real templates, render with FFmpeg compiled to WebAssembly, and download — no servers, no uploads, no limits.

cta.prompt: Ready to compose your first video?

private.title: Private by design
private.description: Your clips never leave your device. There is no upload, no account, no server in the loop.

ffmpeg.title: Real FFmpeg, locally
ffmpeg.description: The same FFmpeg engine the core library uses, compiled to WebAssembly and run on your machine.

templates.title: Template-driven
templates.description: Compose from real JSON templates — filters, overlays, transitions and audio mixing included.

author.name: Alexandre Mogère
author.bio: Paris-based web developer building tools that empower creators, and writing about coding & AI at Zazen Code.

thanks.lead: None of this renders without FFmpeg.
thanks.body: Every clip, filter, and transition LeClap produces runs on FFmpeg — decades of open-source multimedia engineering kept alive by a worldwide community of volunteers.
